metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_2196
metadata.comment:
Rationale: EFA6A was enriched in postsynaptic density fractions.
EFA6A was localized in dendrites and dendritic spines.
Immunogold particles for EFA6A were deposited preferentially on the post-synaptic side and distributed inside and near the PSD in the dendritic spine, with the highest density located between 60 and 90 nm from the post-synaptic plasma membrane.. Experimental description: Materials and methods
Immunohistochemistry
Under deep pentobarbital anesthesia (100 mg/kg of body weight, i.p.), four wild-type eight-week-old male C57BL/6N mice were perfused.
Subcellular fractionation
Forebrains from five adult male C57BL/6N mice were homogenized.
